title: appledog
description: adds appledog and applepup and dogapple!!!!
body:
appledog!

- Appledogs will always spawn around the coordinates -255 69!
- Breeding appledogs with apples have a chance to mutate the baby into different apple varieties!
- There are 5 varieties - Red Delicious, Macoun, Pink Lady, Granny Smith, and Golden Delicious!
- On death, appledogs will drop an apple and rarely will drop a dogapple!
- Dogapples can bark!
